name: Kento Sugiyama
description: A community-oriented flood information system for browser-based watershed exploration, inundation mapping, and impact analysis built on national hydrologic datasets.

name: Joey Zambreno
description: IAHeroes is a comprehensive digital archive where veterans, their families, and community members can submit, explore, and interact with veteran stories, creating a lasting legacy for future generations.

name: Myles Hardy
description: Planelooly is a game about connecting airports, and it hopes to teach players about geography and the air travel industry.

name: Aditi Muthukumar
description: A data-driven cannabis education platform built for teens, parents, and schools
